rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §12.1053, which governs charter school purchasing and contracting procedures. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 12.1053. APPLICABILITY OF LAWS RELATING TO PUBLIC PURCHASING AND CONTRACTING.
_note: Rule text concerns charter school purchasing/contracting; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
